## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed solution

Describe the API surface you'd like to see:

```typescript
// Example of how the feature would be used
const result = await sdk.newFeature({ ... });
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've considered and why they don't work.

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
